headline: 8 projects moved forward with a visible mix of educational content.
subhead: The diary surfaced 9 curated updates after scanning the last 7 days of local repo activity and translating the strongest signals into plain-language progress notes.

days.label: Today
days.summary: 3 projects produced visitor-worthy movement, with most of the visible momentum landing in interface work, educational content, and proof and validation.

entries.title: Workflow Garden focused on proof that people can actually inspect
entries.summary: Workflow Garden moved through interface work, educational content, and proof and validation with a broad round of momentum, then condensed that movement into a short update that a non-developer can follow.
entries.whyItMatters: It gives visitors visible evidence instead of asking them to trust a vague claim that the workflow works.
